name: Airtel Zambia PLC
description: Subsidiary of Airtel Africa PLC, listed on LuSE with significant institutional backing. The dominant telecom operator in Zambia with the largest subscriber base.

analystNotes.note: Liquidity anchor of LuSE — consistently the highest value-traded counter. But 85% parent lock-up means price is set on thin float. Concentration risk is real: 71% of market turnover on Jan 28.
analystNotes.author: Vituli Musukuma, PhD
